transcript.text:
[Warning: This video reeks alcohol]
Yummy

[Sleepiness +100]
[Chat: Go to sleep!] No!
If you tell me not to sleep, then I'll go to sleep
[Tree Frog Tzuyang]
[This footage can be harmful to mental health, but please keep watching]
No wait, I'm not drunk enough for that
I want to interact with the chat today over mukbang
[Ground Soybean Stew]
[Eat, and eat again]
[Interacting with the stew instead]
[Hello, Goodbye]
[Ground Soybean Stew.. into her belly]
[It's not over yet]

That's a lot of stuff
I didn't order this much
Steak tartare!
Tartare sushi too I forgot I ordered these too
These are just veggies I won't be eating this
[-Radish Sprouts]
[-Ginseng]
[+Egg yolk]
[Where are you hiding?]
[I got you]
Yay steak tartare
I love it
Let's dip it in sesame oil+salt
[1 bite]
[Happy]
It's so tasty

This is crazy
Best
The truth
Meat=The Truth
[Now for the alcohol]
[So much food to go with it]
[These are just munchies]
[Here comes the main]
[Munchies first, alcohol later]
So good
[Yummy skewers]
Cheers
That's very nice
[Chat: What is your favorite beer?]
Hoegaarden Rosée [Sad Kronenbourg Blanc]
[Almost looks like an ad]

That's amazing
[Leggo]
[1. Shake]
[2. Tap]
[3. Twist]
[4. Pour]
[5. Cheers]
Very nice
For drinks like Chungha (brand), the flavor differs so much on your condition
I want some wine
I should've bought some wine
[Cheers]
The chicken skin is a bit salty
It's good though
Yum
This is the cheddar cheese sauce

[Chat: Tell us about your first love]
I don't have one
I don't think I have one
Idk who it is
I can't call him my first love
It wasn't love
It was the first person that I thought was handsome
Was it 2nd grade in elementary?
We went to the same church
He was in the 6th grade
I thought he was handsome
For the first time in my life
[Let's drink up]
[Auto-Fuel since she's drunk]
React to the donations? Right now?
Now?

2 of them?
[I'm Tzuyang]
[Tzu-runk has entered the chat]
What did you guys want me to do again? A reaction?
I'm not drunk enough for that
Not drunk enough
[40 people have left the stream]
Really? I'm hurt
[You can get over it with alcohol]
Jingu?
Are you drunk?
[My Jingu]
[Here we go again..]
[Alcohol smell..]
So cute
Don't run from me

[Punch]
[Escape]
[My owner is up for adoption - Jingu]
[Revenge]
[Who was that?]
No~~
[You bothered me first]
Come here you!
You can't come down anymore
It's a punishment
[Say what now?]
[Bye~]
[Let's just drink some more]
[Getting hot]
Thank you for the donations
[Need to do 4 reactions]

If I do anything sexy, it's over
Your monitors and phone screens will crack
You guys will crush it
[RIP Headphone users]
Let's not listen to music for a while
For 5 minutes
[Getting sleepy]
[Wake me up at the next station, please]
[What?]
[We're at the final stop?]
[Chat: Just go to sleep] No!
I'll go to sleep if you tell me not to sleep
[Croak]
I appreciate it Take it easy, everyone~
Have a happy day tomorrow [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
